title: Fuffle
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Fuffle.jpg]] |name=Fuffle |homeworld=[[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]][[Star Wars (1977) 67|''Star Wars'' (1977) 67]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojib]] |gender= |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|White]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It ''seems'' that his full attention is centered on poor Chewbacca, Plif! What shall we do?"
"The only thing a respectable Hoojib ''can'' do, Fuffle—we ''attack!''|Fuffle and Plif|}} '''Fuffle''' was a [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojib]] who accompanied [[Plif/Legends|Plif]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and several other Hoojibs into a tunnel under the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] base on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] to look for [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. They were attacked by the [[Darker]], a being which could control emotions, and which heightened the Hoojibs' inclination to fear, making them flee in panic. As the Darker turned his attention to Chewbacca, his grip on the Hoojibs, Fuffle included, was lessened. Charging the mysterious being, they were able to distract its attention long enough for the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] to kill it. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 67|''Star Wars'' (1977) 67]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 67}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Hoojibs]]
